ddls:
CREATE TABLE "legislative_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the legislative document */,
  "action_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official who took the action */,
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of action taken */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Result of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "meeting_details" TEXT /* Details of the meeting where the action was discussed */,
  "seattle_channel" TEXT /* Seattle Channel reference number */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative document */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meeting */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the legislative action */,
  "public_notes" TEXT /* Notes for public transparency */,
  "internal_notes" TEXT /* Internal notes for officials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_actions_action_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_type_id") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_actions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_actions_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_actions_action_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_by_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_actions_seattle_channel FOREIGN KEY ("seattle_channel") REFERENCES channel_references ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_actions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official in the legislative process */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the official belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for official communication */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for official communication */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Address of the official's office */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the official started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the official ended their role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the action is public */,
  "is_reversible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the action can be reversed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the result is final */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Description of the next steps after this result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "meeting_location" TEXT /* Location where the meeting took place */,
  "attendees" TEXT /* List of attendees at the meeting */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the meeting */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "public_agenda_url" TEXT /* URL to the public agenda */,
  "minutes_url" TEXT /* URL to the meeting minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the legislative document */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the document was submitted */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the document */,
  "public_summary" TEXT /* Public summary of the document */,
  "internal_summary" TEXT /* Internal summary of the document */,
  "draft_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official who drafted the document */,
  "approved_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official who approved the document */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the document becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_draft_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_by_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_approved_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the status is active */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the status is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  "approved_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official who approved the version */,
  "draft_date" TEXT /* Date the version was drafted */,
  "draft_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official who drafted the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_draft_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_by_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel reference */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative action */,
  "channel_number" TEXT /* Seattle Channel number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel reference */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video of the channel reference */,
  "transcript_url" TEXT /* URL to the transcript of the channel reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legislative document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the legislative process */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for user communication */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for user communication */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user ended their role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
